sections.title: Getting started
sections.description: Install Rata, make your first typed request, and choose a backend handler at the boundary.

sections.title: Requests
sections.description: The fetch model: FetchSpec, methods, and the get, post, and send helpers.

sections.title: Responses
sections.description: The Response record, status helpers like expect_success, and reading headers and body bytes.

sections.title: Backends
sections.description: The backend-neutral Fetch effect, the Httpc backend over OTP inets, and TLS defaults.

sections.title: Testing
sections.description: Rata.Fetch.Mock for tests: always, failing, and route matching without hitting the network.
